title: Temporary weekday closure of Storms River suspension bridge
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The suspension bridge at...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The suspension bridge at the Storms River Mouth Rest Camp in the Tsitsikamma section of the Garden Route National Park is temporarily closed from 1 to 15 September.


> The closure is necessary for planned maintenance and will be in effect on weekdays (Monday to Friday) during this period.


The bridge will be open to visitors on Saturdays and Sundays.

While the bridge will be inaccessible on weekdays, visitors are encouraged to take advantage of the wide range of activities still available at Storms River Mouth:

•Waterfall Trail & Otter Trail (Day Access)•Loerie & Blue Duiker Trails•Kayak & Lilo Adventures•Birdwatching & Photography•Restaurant & Gift Shop

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
